name: Rum-Glazed Apple Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages Soft cream cheese (8 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted butter. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325°F for 10 minutes.
3. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese and sugar. Mix until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Pour the mixture over the crust.
6. Toss the apples with sugar and cinnamon. Spoon the apple mixture over the cream cheese layer.
7. Sprinkle pecans evenly on top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes.
9. Remove from the oven and let cool slightly.
10. Heat the apple jelly and rum together in a small saucepan until warm.
11. Spoon the glaze over the cheesecake.
12. Let the cheesecake cool completely before serving.
